name: Tofu and Broccoli Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lettuce.
2. Break into large pieces.
3. Peel and slice the cucumber into 1/4" slices.
4. Peel and slice the cucumber into 1/4 slices.
5. Rinse the green beans; cut into 1-inch pieces.
6. Place the greens, cucumber, and beans in a plastic bag or tightly covered container. Store in the refrigerator for 4 to 6 hours or overnight to crisp.
7. Trim mushroom stems to just below the cap.
8. Cut mushrooms into thin slices (discard if discolored).
9. Just before serving, carefully pat the greens, cucumber, and beans dry on a towel.
10. Place in a wooden bowl; cover with French dressing.
11. Toss lightly to coat all ingredients with dressing.
12. Top with mushrooms.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CAL: 60
